evidenceSnippetOriginal: Misusing AI can breach the Academic Integrity Policy 2022 . Examples of misuse include: Submitting AI-generated work without appropriate acknowledgment using AI where it has been prohibited in a 'secure' assessment type, such as during a secure exam inputting University teaching or course materials, content generated by another student, intellectual property from external partners, or any person's personal or health information.
evidenceLocator: When you can and can't use AI section, Misuse of AI
